description_long: This is a rectangular, two-row brick house structure with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The front facade features a series of evenly spaced rectangular windows and several plain entry doors, all framed in white. The rear of the house opens onto private green courtyards, each bordered by wooden fencing, suggesting individual outdoor spaces for each unit. The interior layout is divided into multiple rooms, each with its own wooden door, indicating a multi-family or townhouse configuration. The exterior walls are clad in a reddish-brown brick pattern, while the interior walls are finished in white. The overall appearance is functional and straightforward, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A rectangular brick house with flat roof, symmetrical windows, and private green courtyards at the rear. The design is modern and utilitarian, with multiple entry doors and a clear multi-unit layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing symmetrical rows of windows and several entry doors set in a brick facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid brick wall with minimal openings and a glimpse of the interior room divisions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying private green courtyards bordered by wooden fencing and the back of the house with small windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid brick wall and the layout of the rear courtyards.
attribute_entryway_design: Multiple plain entry doors with no porch or decorative elements, flush with the brick facade.
